For full-mouth procedures like All-on-4 or All-on-6, expect prices to range from ₹3,00,000 to ₹10,00,000 ($3,500–$12,000) per arch.The exact price you pay is determined by several factors:Implant Brand: Premium imported brands (e.g., Nobel Biocare, Straumann) cost more than standard or domestic options (e.g., Osstem, Hiossen).Crown/Abutment Material: The visible tooth part made of Zirconia, porcelain, or metal will vary the final price.Additional Procedures: If you require bone grafting or a sinus lift, expect to pay an extra ₹10,000 to ₹30,000 on average.Many established clinics in Pune (such as Smilekraft Dentistry or Jehangir Oracare) offer zero-cost EMI options or financing plans to help manage procedure costs.Many established clinics in Pune (such as Smilekraft Dentistry or Jehangir Oracare) offer zero-cost EMI options or financing plans to help manage procedure costs.If you'd like, you can tell me more about your needs to narrow down the costs:How many teeth do you need to replace?Do you have existing jawbone loss?Are you interested in premium vs. standard implant brands?If you'd like, you can tell me more about your needs to narrow down the costs:

organicResults.description: At DentalTree our highly skilled prosthodontists offer you the best solution for missing teeth, crooked, broken, discolored and oddly shaped teeth.Read more

peopleAlsoAsk.answer: While many other dentists can do some of these treatments, prosthodontists are the specialists dedicated to this type of care. Prosthodontists have advanced training in restoring and replacing teeth. Prosthodontists are considered the leaders of the dental treatment plan.
peopleAlsoAsk.question: Is a prosthodontist better than a dentist?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: Why See a Prosthodontist? - GoToAPro

peopleAlsoAsk.answer: Prosthodontics is the branch of dentistry focused on making dental prostheses. A prosthodontist specializes in making dentures, crowns, bridges and other custom-made oral appliances.
peopleAlsoAsk.question: What does a prosthodontist treat?
